message:
style(tests): normalize rustfmt formatting in FrankenNode contract tests

Apply rustfmt line-collapsing to single-string error messages in two
FrankenNode contract test files:

- franken_node_practical_finish_contract.rs: collapse multi-line
  ok_or_else closure for residual_bead_threshold error to single line
- franken_node_runtime_integration_contract.rs: collapse multi-line
  Err() returns for fail_closed_on_missing_crate and rollback_supported
  validation errors to single lines

Pure formatting — no logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
